body:
## Summary

- Add `maxLength={LOCAL_STUDY_DATA_IMPORT_MAX_BYTES}` to the Settings local study-data import `TextInput`, keeping the UI cap aligned with the parser's existing 1 MB pre-parse guard.
- Extend the local study-data import copy/source guard so the input cap cannot be removed while the max-size copy remains.
- Carry the generated-answer option-shape normalization needed for current `main` full content validation with generated localization overlays.

## Validation

- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern 'local study data import summary keeps Swedish copy learner-facing' tests/content-local-study-data-import-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern 'settings route' tests/content-settings-route-copy-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
- `npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `E2E_PORT=4576 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npx playwright test tests/e2e/settings-import-purchase-fields.spec.ts --workers=1 --grep 'import'`
- `npm run test:a11y-labels`

## Notes

- The broader task-suggested import parity command remains base-red when run across the whole file because unrelated storage-harness tests currently fail on `tests/v1-1-review-store.test.js`'s legacy TypeScript hook and storage module resolution before this task's focused assertion. The focused source/copy guard added here passes, and full `validate:content` passes.
title: [codex] Cap local study import input
